content_body:
Very few experiences come close to the feeling of standing at the base of a waterfall and the sense of awe that accompanies it. This sensation is truly something everyone should enjoy during their Blue Ridge visit! Known for its proximity and access to the Appalachian Trail and Benton-MacKaye Trail, Blue Ridge, GA is home to several spectacular waterfalls that will leave you wanting more. 

For those that want to stay in a central location, we have paired the best waterfalls in North Georgia with our luxury cabin rentals! Ensuring you reserve a property close to prime activities means you are not spending half the day driving around. Maximize your 'mountain time' with one of our 5-star vacation rentals, outfitted with all the amenities you could desire after an exciting day spent chasing waterfalls.

Fall Branch Falls

Located along the Benton MacKaye Trail, Fall Branch Falls is one of the most accessible and family-friendly waterfalls in Blue Ridge. A 1-mile, shaded hike leads you to a two-tiered waterfall with a shallow end for splashing around. It’s a great choice for families with small children or couples looking for a centrally-located outing. Stop by the Toccoa Riverside Restaurant after for a scenic bite to eat! 

Where to Stay:

     

  • Aska Escape Lodge: Just minutes from the trail, Aska Escape Lodge is a spacious 3-bedroom/3-bathroom property that exudes the rustic elegance of mountain living. With expansive outdoor living options, a game room, and a hot tub, it’s perfect for families or couples. After a morning hike to the falls, return for a cozy evening by the outdoor fireplace or in the hot tub. Offering a location that second to none, this is the perfect vacation rental for hiking adventures.

     

  • Above the Timberline: Boasting beautiful mountain views, Above the Timberline offers serene seclusion just a short drive from Fall Branch Falls. This professionally decorated cabin features soaring ceilings, designer furnishings, and a window wall that ties the outdoors in. Guests will love the four King bedrooms, game room, hot tub, and outdoor fireplace. This luxury cabin near Blue Ridge waterfall hikes gives you a refined home base to return to after romping around the Aska Adventure area.

Sea Creek Falls & Long Creek Falls

Tucked away in the Chattahoochee National Forest, Sea Creek Falls and Long Creek Falls offer two distinct experiences within a short drive of each other. Both falls are considered easy, with Sea Creek Falls being about 0.5 mile trip and Long Creek Falls about 2 miles. Both are hidden gems ideal for those seeking a unique and fulfilling day in Blue Ridge.

Where to Stay:

     

  • Serendipity on Noontootla Creek: This spacious 5-bedroom/5.5 bathroom lodge sits above the banks of the prized Noontootla Creek, providing stunning mountain views and plenty of deck space. Spend your mornings sipping coffee in the Master bedroom solarium, then head out for a day of waterfall exploration. When recouping from hiking, enjoy the 5 King Suites, expansive game room, 'Treehouse' deck with outdoor fireplace and hot tub, plus so much more. Serendipity is one of the top waterfront cabins near Sea Creek Falls and Long Creek Falls.

     

  • Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek: Located below Serendipity, Cherokee Sunrise is ideal for small groups seeking peace and privacy. This 100-year old farmhouse surrounded by 25 acres and mountain serenity boasts a pool table, 2-bedrooms, a screened-in porch with TV and fire table, and a custom stone fire pit. With its rustic décor and historical setting, it’s a prime choice for romantic cabins near Long Creek Falls.

Turtletown Creek Falls

Just over the nearby Georgia-Tennessee line lies Turtletown Creek Falls, a less-traveled gem featuring two massive cascading falls surrounded by mossy boulders and pristine forest. The moderate, 3.8-mile trail to the falls is a favorite among those seeking less crowded hikes. If you're looking for cabins near Turtletown Creek Falls, you have plenty of options with Cabin Rentals of Georgia.

Where to Stay:


The Rivers Edge

Our Toccoa River Luxury Cabin Rentals boast the prime location for your hiking adventure to Turtletown Creek Falls. This collection of cabins features three 5-bedroom lodges and two 4-bedroom cabin rentals. These North Georgia cabins with river access are perfect for those who want to maximize time outside without having to leave the cabin. Perfect for multiple families or even large family reunions, you can reserve any number of cabins in this group for a luxury mountain vacation near Blue Ridge.

Boasting all King and Queen Suites with a few twin daybeds sprinkled in, these five luxury cabins hold all the amenities you desire and expect in a top-notch cabin: game rooms, hot tubs, stocked kitchens, spacious living area, SMART TVs, and so much more. Several of the group are prime luxury riverfront cabins in North Georgia, and their proximity to Turtletown Creek Falls means you have a number of options for making memories in and around the cabins. 

Jacks River Falls

For the more adventurous traveler, Jacks River Falls is a must for your North Georgia hiking bucket list. Requiring a moderate but rewarding 9-mile hike through the Cohutta Wilderness, this destination is for seasoned hikers looking for a day-long experience into the mountains. Finding centrally located luxury cabins near these falls can be challenging, but we have two stellar options for you!

Where to Stay:

     

  • Cohutta Sunset: With panoramic views of the Cohutta Wilderness, this custom-built luxury cabin gives front-row access to some of North Georgia’s best sunsets. A fan favorite for a reason, Cohutta Sunset offers 3 King Suites, rustic furnishings, custom rock showers, a pool table, hot tub, and a total of four indoor/outdoor fireplaces. After a long hike to Jacks River Falls, return to this peaceful haven to watch the stars from the decks. It's a top pick for a romantic waterfall getaway in North Georgia.

     

  • Creekside Green: Nestled along Fightingtown creek and perfect for families with younger kids, Creekside Green is a secluded waterfront luxury cabin. It offers a cozy interior, fully stocked kitchen, outdoor fire pit, and plenty of outdoor dining perfect for morning coffee or evening refreshments. It’s one of the best creekfront cabins in North Georgia, and close to horseback riding!

Plan Your Waterfall Hiking Getaway in Blue Ridge, GA

The gateway to the North Georgia mountains, Blue Ridge holds an abundance of hiking and waterfall options located with 5-30 minutes from our luxury cabin rentals. Each of these Blue Ridge homes pairs the rustic nature of the area with the comforts of home—fireplaces, hot tubs, river access, and mountain views.

When planning your next getaway, consider searching for "Blue Ridge cabins near waterfalls" or "North Georgia cabin rentals near hiking trails." You’ll discover a collection of hand-picked properties with Cabin Rentals of Georgia offering prime locations to the activities you value most. 

Give our team a call today at (706) 432-2140 and let us help guide you to your perfect Blue Ridge cabin!
title: Luxury Georgia Cabins Near Waterfalls
